name: finde-ai-server
description: FindE AI backend API for community + web search agent.

scripts.agent:ask: curl -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/agent/ask -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query":"beginner AI cybersecurity research idea","sourceMode":"all","limit":5}'
scripts.search:internship: curl -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/search -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query":"remote frontend internship for CSE students","sourceMode":"all","limit":5}'
scripts.search:research: curl -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/search -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query":"AI cybersecurity research idea for beginner","sourceMode":"all","limit":5}'
scripts.web:internship: curl -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/web/search -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query":"remote software engineering internship for CSE students","limit":5,"cache":true}'
scripts.posts:search: curl -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/search -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query":"React internship CSE student deadline","sourceMode":"community","limit":5}'
scripts.research:search: curl -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/search -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query":"AI cybersecurity FYP idea CICIDS SHAP","sourceMode":"community","limit":5}'
